base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of dracula_multi_form — a character (final_boss) from 1997 castlevania symphony of night. Dracula final-boss — normal form + demon-giant transformation. Shaft (dark priest) pre-boss. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Dracula final-boss — normal form + demon-giant transformation. Shaft (dark priest) pre-boss
